Project Overview

A world-class clubhouse
for Al Zorah's
championship course

Al Zorah Golf Club in Ajman is one of the UAE's premier golf destinations — an 18-hole championship course set within a stunning natural reserve. Spaceó Interiors was engaged to design and deliver the complete interior fit-out of the clubhouse facilities.

The brief demanded a space that felt luxurious without being ostentatious — a refined retreat for golfers and members that complemented the natural beauty outside. We responded with a palette of warm stone, walnut timber, brushed bronze, and signature Calacatta marble.

From the grand lobby lounge and marble bar to the formal dining room, private dining, pro shop retail, and changing facilities — every space was designed with the same level of care and craft.

Scope of Work

Every space designed
to the same standard

Lobby Lounge

Grand arrival lounge with custom seating clusters, marble tables, and an integrated bar — the social heart of the clubhouse.

Restaurant & Dining

Main restaurant with leather upholstered feature wall, designer pendant lighting, and a private dining room with bespoke round table.

Marble Bar

Full back-bar with brushed bronze cabinetry and a stunning Calacatta bookmatched marble front — a centrepiece of the lobby.

Pro Shop Retail

High-end golf retail environment with walnut display walls, illuminated shelving, and a central display podium.

Members Changing Rooms

Full changing facilities with custom marble counters, bespoke timber joinery, backlit mirror panels, and Nero Marquina floor tiles.

Circulation & Staircases

Feature staircase with illuminated risers, travertine wall cladding, and dark walnut handrails connecting all floor levels.
